_comment.name: ARTIV DTC Codes grabbed from Diagbox FDB. ECUTYPE union: ARTIV, ARTIV_UDS, CORNER_RADAR_FL, CORNER_RADAR_FR, CORNER_RADAR_RL, CORNER_RADAR_RR, FRONT_RADAR_5, RADAR_AV_4, RADAR_AV_W2_25. Conflicting labels resolved by majority vote across ECUTYPEs.

B1210.name: Disalignment fault in the Distance Alert sensor

B1213.name: Deterioration in the performance of the corner radar

B1214.name: Programming of the distance alert radar in progress

B1215.name: Fault of lack of coherence between the information from the built-in systems interface and the collision risk alert function

B1216.name: Coherence of the information between the brake sensor and the emergency collision braking function

B1217.name: Downgrading of the functions linked with the distance alert radar following the receipt of incoherent information

B1254.name: Alignment too great between the centreline of the distance alert radar and the centreline of the multifunction video camera

B1298.name: Lack of coherence between the collision risk alert activation request sent by the built-in systems interface and the collision risk alert from the distance alert radar

B1299.name: Lack of coherence between the emergency collision braking activation request sent by the built-in systems interface and the collision risk alert from the distance alert radar

B129A.name: Lack of coherence between the selection status sent by the built-in systems interface and the activation status of the adaptive cruise control

B129B.name: Lack of coherence between the adaptive cruise control request, the distance alert ECU request and the speed setting transmitted by the built-in systems interface

B129C.name: Lack of coherence between the activation statuses of the adaptive cruise control and of the speed limiter sent by the built-in systems interface

B129D.name: Lack of coherence between the torque reference value and the accelerator pedal

B129E.name: Simultaneous control between the ESP ECU and the engine management ECU

B129F.name: Lack of coherence between the request from the distance alert ECU and the status return from the engine management ECU

B12A0.name: Lack of coherence between the request from the distance alert ECU and the status return from the ESP ECU

B12A1.name: Vehicle speed reference value outside the range

B12A5.name: Reference value from the distance alert ECU outside the range

B12A7.name: Data from the adaptive cruise control read by the engine management ECU

B12A8.name: Data from the emergency collision braking function read by the ESP ECU

B12A9.name: Data from the adaptive cruise control read by the ESP ECU

B12C1.name: Acceleration when starting is too fast for the adaptive cruise control

B12C2.name: Internal temperature of the distance alert radar

B12CA.name: Deterioration in the performance of the front radar

B1679.name: Headway-time radar disturbance due to surrounding high-frequency waves

B18F8.name: Maximum value of the time counter reached for the driving aid system (ADAS)

B2EF1.name: Poor alignment of the corner radar

B2EF4.name: Front radar and multifunction video camera

B2EF9.name: Alignment of the corner radar completed with failure

B2EFA.name: Inconsistency between the calculated speed and the wheel speed transmitted by the dynamic stability control (ESP) ECU

U0126.name: No communication with steering wheel angle sensor

U0146.name: Absence of communication with the BSI
